title: SpoonPack
description:
Built off the back of the Fabulously Optimized Modpack, SpoonPack Delivers exploration, Fun, and overall expansions to vanilla. 
This Vanilla+ Modpack encourages building with new blocks and biomes to conquer.
body:
This is an optimized Modpack focused on fun and adventure. 
The world Gen system has been revamped using terralith, Incendium and Nullscape, resulting in a much more rewarding Overworld, Nether, and End experience.
More structures are added thanks to Luki's Grand Capitals. There are also more mob variants for iron golems and axolotls to name a few.
Many cosmetic QOL tweaks, such as more chat history and chat heads. 
The overall function of the modpack is to improve Vanilla gameplay.
